summary: The user sought recommendations for coffee shops in Shimokitazawa, where they frequently visit with their friend Rachel. They also inquired about language exchange apps to improve their Japanese skills, expressed interest in exploring lesser-known neighborhoods in Tokyo, and sought thrift stores and used bookstores for unique finds and Japanese literature.
facts: The user has been spending a lot of time in Shimokitazawa with their friend Rachel. The user arrived in Tokyo about 6 months ago. The user is looking to improve their Japanese skills. The user is interested in exploring lesser-known neighborhoods in Tokyo. The user loves browsing thrift stores for unique souvenirs or decorations for their apartment. The user is searching for a vintage kimono to decorate their apartment. The user is trying to find Japanese literature to practice their reading skills. The user plans to check out thrift stores in Kichijoji and Nakameguro.
